sections.paragraph:
Original: יטוּר

Transliteration: yeṭûr

Phonetic: yet-oor'

BDB Definition:

Jetur = "enclosed"
  1. a son of Ishmael whose descendants warred with Israel east of the Jordan
    1. also called 'Ituraea'

Origin: probably from the same as H2905

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
